---
title: "LIFES Networking Meeting"
categories:
  - LIFES
author: 
  - name: Norbert van Dijk
    orcid: 0009-0003-5409-652X
date: 10-09-2025
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

![](lifes-network-meeting.jpeg)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

See event published [here](https://www.lifes.institute/event-details/lifes-networking-meeting-2025-10-14-13-30) for details and registration. 

------------------------------------------------------------------------
